title: T-019 — UI: Asset Registry List + Detail (MNT-015, MNT-016, asset_edit_modal MNT-M-01)
prompt:
# T-019 — Asset Registry pages

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.3 MNT-015, MNT-016
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:209-300
Prototypes: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/maintenance/assets.jsx:1-518 (asset_list_page L1-183, asset_detail_page L185-518); modals.jsx:29-79 (asset_edit_modal MNT-M-01); modals.jsx:824-844 (criticality_override_modal MNT-M-14)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component routes `/maintenance/assets` (list with hierarchy sidebar + filter bar + bulk export) and `/maintenance/assets/[id]` (8-tab detail). Includes asset_edit_modal (create/edit) and criticality_override_modal. The equipment hierarchy follows the canonical 5-level chain: site → area → line → machine → component — all five levels must be navigable in the sidebar tree and filterable via the filter bar per PRD §9.3.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/assets/page.tsx` — RSC reads `equipment` + (placeholder) asset hierarchy via Drizzle; passes to client filter component using nuqs URL params. Hierarchy sidebar 280px column per UX:209-262.
2. `apps/web/app/maintenance/assets/[id]/page.tsx` — 8-tab detail (Overview, Service History, PM Schedule, Calibration, Spares BOM, Documents, Downtime Events, Sensors placeholder) per UX:265-300.
3. Modals: `asset_edit_modal.tsx` and `criticality_override_modal.tsx` as Server Action-bound forms with shadcn Dialog primitives; RBAC `mnt.asset.edit` server-side.
4. Empty/loading/error/permission states for list (no assets), detail (asset not found / 404), modals (form errors).
5. i18n `maintenance.assets.list.*`, `maintenance.assets.detail.*`, `maintenance.asset.form.*`, `maintenance.asset.criticalityOverride.*` keys from T-013.

## Prototype parity
- List: hierarchy sidebar + filter bar (type/criticality/status/loto/cal toggles) + table with bulk checkbox + Export CSV streaming + RBAC-gated "Add Asset" button — verify by RTL snapshot of assets.jsx:1-183.
- Detail: 8-tab nav + nameplate card + MTBF/MTTR gauges (read from 15-OEE) + LOTO/calibration banners + Spares BOM with stock-low row styling + Sensors P2 placeholder with disabled overlay (BL-MAINT-01) — verify by snapshot of assets.jsx:185-518.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/assets/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/assets/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/assets/_components/asset-list-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/assets/_components/asset-edit-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/assets/_components/criticality-override-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/assets/_components/__tests__/asset-list.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/assets/_components/__tests__/asset-detail.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given list page renders, when compared to prototypes assets.jsx:1-183, then hierarchy sidebar + 6-filter bar + bulk-checkbox table + Export CSV + RBAC-gated Add Asset match — verified by RTL parity checklist.
2. Given detail page renders, when compared to assets.jsx:185-518, then 8-tab nav + nameplate + LOTO/calibration banners + Spares BOM stock-low styling + Sensors placeholder match.
3. Given a manager session, when Add Asset button is clicked, then asset_edit_modal opens; on submit Server Action upserts equipment and emits outbox asset.created/asset.updated.
4. Given operator session (no mnt.asset.edit), when page renders, then Add Asset button is hidden server-side.
5. Given criticality_override modal submitted, when settled, then maintenance_history audit row appended + asset.criticality_changed outbox event emitted with old/new values.
6. Given task closeout, when reviewers inspect evidence, then Playwright trace + screenshots of list and detail attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL tests for parity + RBAC + modals; Playwright e2e for tab nav + modal flows.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/assets`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not introduce a separate `assets` table — equipment IS the asset table (D-MNT-3 / §9.3).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate per translation notes.
- Do not bypass RBAC server-side.
- Do not emit outbox `asset.created` for read-only operations.
- Do not omit empty/loading/error states (UI parity policy mandates all four).

pipeline_inputs.description: Asset list + 8-tab detail + asset_edit_modal + criticality_override_modal; prototype parity per UX:209-300 and assets.jsx.
